segments.text: Ooh, I'm surprised that forward air or forward smash that did not connect right there.
Maybe mistimed it a little bit, and oh, this might be a kill.
Ooh, he finds the air dodge as well.

full_text: Ooh, I'm surprised that forward air or forward smash that did not connect right there. Maybe mistimed it a little bit, and oh, this might be a kill. Ooh, he finds the air dodge as well.
